rationale: Educ. Code §39.055 governs accountability treatment of students in juvenile court-ordered residential programs. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: a student ordered by a juvenile court into a residential program or facility operated by or under contract with the Texas Juvenile Justice Department
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this accountability provision.
